caption: The video features a woman sitting in what appears to be a podcast studio, as indicated by the "Boss Talk 101 Podcast" logo visible on the screen. She is wearing headphones and is positioned in front of a microphone, suggesting she is either hosting or participating in a podcast episode. The woman has her hair styled in an updo and is dressed in a black t-shirt. In the background, there is a television screen displaying the name "Johnson," which might be related to the content of the podcast. At one point, she adjusts her headphones with her right hand, indicating she is actively engaged in the recording process. The setting includes a white wall and a black door with a yellow frame, contributing to a professional yet casual atmosphere typical of podcast recordings.
